history.content:
<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead and two cells to the right of my current position. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell ('.'), so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal. I will move forward now, and later turn right to navigate toward the goal while avoiding the lava cells on the right side of row 6.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible ahead and to the right. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell (`.`) while the cells to my right are lava (`L`). I can safely move forward to approach the goal, then later turn right to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells to the right of my position. Directly in front of me is a wall `#`, so I cannot move forward. Turning right will orient me towards the open path to the goal. Turning left would face a wall. So I will turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead in the direction I am facing (up/north), as indicated by the '^' at the bottom-center. The cell directly in front of me is empty ('.'), so it is safe to move forward. No lava or wall blocks the path. I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me. I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
